case_title: TEOFILO TRINIDAD VS. URBAN CONSTRUCTION CORP. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TRINIDAD, TEOFILO

NOTICE AND MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO ADD NON PARTY ALTER EGO AS JUDGMENT DEBTOR, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINIDAD, TEOFILO HEARING SET FOR OCT-18-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TEOFILO TRINIDAD'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO ADD NON PARTY ALTER EGO AS JUDGMENT DEBTOR. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-18-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINIDAD, TEOFILO AS TO DEFENDANT URBAN CONSTRUCTION CORP. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINIDAD, TEOFILO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT URBAN CONSTRUCTION CORP.
